answerToWhatGame: 1262600
audioFaults: yes
concludingNotes: Tried using FMM, but got stuck on the symlink issue. Then tried the launch options from the patch (brawltendo) alone, which made the game run smooth, but the camera was spazzing out and some weird things were happening.
Apparently there are ways of fixing that, but I don't want to spend more time figuring out, how to get the game running smoothly. Maybe I'll get back at a later point and give an update if I try the patch.

installs: yes
launchOptions: -disable-client-correction false -Client.VisualFrameInterpolation true -GameTime.MaxVariableFps 200 -RenderDevice.VsyncEnable 0 -Ant.InterpolatePoses false
launcher: steam
localMultiplayerAttempted: no
notes.audioFaults: Weird audio artifacts with the launch options I used
notes.performanceFaults: Game Locked and horrible performance issues without launch options.
With the launch options, game was running smooth, but camera was so buggy that it was unplayable.
notes.verdict: The game is great and all, but playing it on linux without intensive patching and whatever is not possible.
